blended.narrative: Mont Blanc is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,839 ft. Looking ahead, 28 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
